user_message:
Create an ad for:
Brand: Tesla
Product type: Model S electric sedan
Tone: innovative, premium, futuristic
Visual style: Sleek, minimalist design with high-contrast lighting emphasizing modernity and cutting-edge technology.
Conceptual technique: technology-driven experiential storytelling
Format: image

brief.headline: Silent. Swift. Charged with the Future.
brief.caption: A gleaming Tesla Model S glides effortlessly across a moonlit cityscape, its reflection shimmering on the glass facades of futuristic skyscrapers, underscoring a vision of an electrified tomorrow.
brief.visual_style: Sleek, minimalist design with high-contrast lighting emphasizing modernity and cutting-edge technology.
brief.typography_style: Modern sans-serif with a sleek, aerodynamic feel
brief.color_scheme: Tesla's signature deep metallic red, graphite grey, and electric blue highlights
